title: T-049 — UI: GRN surfaces (PO wizard + TO modal + list + detail) — WH-004-PO/WH-005/WH-010 (WH §7.1-7.5)
prompt:
# T-049 — UI: GRN surfaces (PO wizard + TO modal + list + detail) — WH-004-PO/WH-005/WH-010 (WH §7.1-7.5)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §7.1, §7.2, §7.3, §7.4, §7.7, §16.6 WH-004-PO/WH-005/WH-010
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx:3-77 (grn_list_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx:83-157 (grn_detail_page)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:24-280 (grn_from_po_wizard)
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:283-331 (grn_from_to_modal)

## Goal
Implement /(app)/warehouse/grns list + detail + GRN-from-PO 3-step wizard + GRN-from-TO modal with 1:1 prototype parity, multi-LP-per-line useFieldArray, GS1 auto-fill, and over-receipt warnings.

## Implementation contract
1. RSC list page + detail page + client-island wizard/modal under `apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/grns/`.
2. PO wizard: 3 steps (select PO, multi-row per line via `useFieldArray`, review+complete) matching prototype 24-280.
3. TO modal: transit-LP receive checklist with per-row destination location picker, scan input for GS1.
4. GS1 scan auto-fill calls T-023 parser; visual cues (green=OK, red=error).
5. Over-receipt: warning Alert + Manager override option per §7.3.
6. All 4 root elements expose `data-prototype-label`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/grn/** [create]
- apps/web/components/warehouse/grn/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx

## Prototype parity
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx:3-77 (grn_list_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx:83-157 (grn_detail_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:24-280 (grn_from_po_wizard)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx:283-331 (grn_from_to_modal)
- Evidence policy: _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given /warehouse/grns renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx:3-77 (grn_list_page), prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/grn-screens.jsx:83-157 (grn_detail_page), then layout, tabs, filter bar, status badges match (RTL snapshot + parity checklist).
2. Given the GRN-from-PO wizard step 2 renders, when operator adds 3 rows for one PO line with different batches/expirations, then 3 LPs are created on complete and the wizard never auto-splits/merges.
3. Given a GS1-128 string is pasted/scanned in step 2, when parsed, then batch/expiry/qty/CW fields are pre-filled (T-023 integration).
4. Given SUM(rows.qty) > ordered × (1 + tolerance%), when complete clicked, then an Over-Receipt Alert appears with Manager override (RBAC-gated).

Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a 5th AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F6 2026-05-14).

## Test strategy
- RED: Playwright + RTL covering 4 labels, multi-LP wizard, GS1 auto-fill, over-receipt path.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test warehouse-grn-ui && pnpm playwright test --project=chromium --grep @warehouse-grn-ui`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-split or merge grn_items rows on the client.
- Do not bypass over-receipt tolerance/manager-override gating.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.

## Dependencies
- T-021
- T-022
- T-023
- T-024
- T-043
